case_title: C. J. CREDIT CORP. DBA CRESCENT JEWELERS VS LAMONT, JOYCE

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C. J. CREDIT CORP.
